# **XYZ LABS** **AI AUTOMATION PILOT PROPOSAL**

**Prepared for ACE Host**  
Live Lead Capture • Trade Show Demo • Switchboard Automation 360

## **Executive Summary**

XYZ Labs proposes a live AI automation pilot for ACE Host that functions as both a production lead capture system and an interactive trade show demonstration. Visitors scan a QR code, submit a lead, receive automated email and SMS communications, schedule an appointment, and watch the workflow complete in real time through Switchboard Automation 360\.

## **Objectives**

* Generate qualified leads  
* Demonstrate AI automation in under three minutes  
* Route leads to the correct salesperson  
* Automate email, SMS, calendar scheduling, and CRM updates

## **Technology Stack**

Cloudflare Workers → General Chaos → Switchboard Automation 360 → Comms 360 → Calendar → CRM → Reporting

![][image6]![][image7]

https://switchboard.xyz-labs.xyz/automation

## **Business Value**

* Live lead capture  
* Automated follow-up  
* SMS automation  
* Appointment scheduling  
* CRM synchronization  
* Trade show demo  
* Reusable workflow
